name: grade_from_score
cpp_unit: int grade_from_score(long s){ if(s>=90) return 4; else if(s>=80) return 3; else if(s>=70) return 2; else if(s>=60) return 1; else return 0; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", grade_from_score(95)); printf("%d
", grade_from_score(82)); printf("%d
", grade_from_score(71)); printf("%d
", grade_from_score(60)); printf("%d
", grade_from_score(40)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(grade_from_score(95))
    print(grade_from_score(82))
    print(grade_from_score(71))
    print(grade_from_score(60))
    print(grade_from_score(40))

name: triangle_type
cpp_unit: int triangle_type(long a, long b, long c){ if(a+b<=c||a+c<=b||b+c<=a) return -1; if(a==b&&b==c) return 3; if(a==b||b==c||a==c) return 2; return 1; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", triangle_type(3,3,3)); printf("%d
", triangle_type(3,3,5)); printf("%d
", triangle_type(3,4,5)); printf("%d
", triangle_type(1,2,10)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(triangle_type(3, 3, 3))
    print(triangle_type(3, 3, 5))
    print(triangle_type(3, 4, 5))
    print(triangle_type(1, 2, 10))

name: quadrant_of_point
cpp_unit: int quadrant_of_point(long x, long y){ if(x==0||y==0) return 0; if(x>0&&y>0) return 1; if(x<0&&y>0) return 2; if(x<0&&y<0) return 3; return 4; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", quadrant_of_point(2,3)); printf("%d
", quadrant_of_point(-2,3)); printf("%d
", quadrant_of_point(-2,-3)); printf("%d
", quadrant_of_point(2,-3)); printf("%d
", quadrant_of_point(0,5)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(quadrant_of_point(2, 3))
    print(quadrant_of_point(-2, 3))
    print(quadrant_of_point(-2, -3))
    print(quadrant_of_point(2, -3))
    print(quadrant_of_point(0, 5))

name: score_to_stars

name: rock_paper_scissors_result
cpp_unit: int rps_result(int a, int b){ if(a==b) return 0; if((a==0&&b==2)||(a==1&&b==0)||(a==2&&b==1)) return 1; return 2; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", rps_result(0,0)); printf("%d
", rps_result(0,2)); printf("%d
", rps_result(1,0)); printf("%d
", rps_result(2,0)); printf("%d
", rps_result(1,2)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(rps_result(0, 0))
    print(rps_result(0, 2))
    print(rps_result(1, 0))
    print(rps_result(2, 0))
    print(rps_result(1, 2))

name: switch_calculator
cpp_unit: long switch_calculator(int op, long a, long b){ if(op==0) return a+b; if(op==1) return a-b; if(op==2) return a*b; if(op==3){ if(b==0) return 0; return a/b; } return -1; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", switch_calculator(0,7,3)); printf("%ld
", switch_calculator(1,7,3)); printf("%ld
", switch_calculator(2,7,3)); printf("%ld
", switch_calculator(3,20,4)); printf("%ld
", switch_calculator(9,1,1)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(switch_calculator(0, 7, 3))
    print(switch_calculator(1, 7, 3))
    print(switch_calculator(2, 7, 3))
    print(switch_calculator(3, 20, 4))
    print(switch_calculator(9, 1, 1))

name: count_digits_loop
cpp_unit: int count_digits_loop(long n){ if(n==0) return 1; int c=0; while(n>0){ n/=10; c++; } return c; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", count_digits_loop(0)); printf("%d
", count_digits_loop(7)); printf("%d
", count_digits_loop(100)); printf("%d
", count_digits_loop(99999)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(count_digits_loop(0))
    print(count_digits_loop(7))
    print(count_digits_loop(100))
    print(count_digits_loop(99999))

name: run_length_count
cpp_unit: long run_length_count(long n){ long runs=0; int prev=-1; while(n>0){ int d=n%10; if(d!=prev){ runs++; prev=d; } n/=10; } return runs; }
mojo_unit:
def run_length_count(n: Int) -> Int:
    var m = n
    var runs = 0
    var prev = -1
    while m > 0:
        var d = m % 10
        if d != prev:
            runs += 1
            prev = d
        m //= 10
    return runs
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", run_length_count(1112233)); printf("%ld
", run_length_count(121212)); printf("%ld
", run_length_count(5)); printf("%ld
", run_length_count(0)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(run_length_count(1112233))
    print(run_length_count(121212))
    print(run_length_count(5))
    print(run_length_count(0))

name: zigzag_sum
cpp_unit: long zigzag_sum(long n){ long s=0; for(long i=1;i<=n;i++){ if(i%2==1) s+=i; else s-=i; } return s; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", zigzag_sum(1)); printf("%ld
", zigzag_sum(4)); printf("%ld
", zigzag_sum(5)); printf("%ld
", zigzag_sum(10)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(zigzag_sum(1))
    print(zigzag_sum(4))
    print(zigzag_sum(5))
    print(zigzag_sum(10))

name: sign_product
cpp_unit: int sign_product(long a, long b, long c){ int s=1; if(a<0) s=-s; if(b<0) s=-s; if(c<0) s=-s; if(a==0||b==0||c==0) return 0; return s; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", sign_product(1,2,3)); printf("%d
", sign_product(-1,2,3)); printf("%d
", sign_product(-1,-2,3)); printf("%d
", sign_product(-1,-2,-3)); printf("%d
", sign_product(0,5,5)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(sign_product(1, 2, 3))
    print(sign_product(-1, 2, 3))
    print(sign_product(-1, -2, 3))
    print(sign_product(-1, -2, -3))
    print(sign_product(0, 5, 5))

name: fibonacci_loop_capped
cpp_unit: long fibonacci_loop_capped(long n, long cap){ long a=0,b=1; for(long i=0;i<n;i++){ long t=a+b; a=b; b=t; if(a>cap) return cap; } return a; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", fibonacci_loop_capped(0,1000)); printf("%ld
", fibonacci_loop_capped(5,1000)); printf("%ld
", fibonacci_loop_capped(10,1000)); printf("%ld
", fibonacci_loop_capped(20,1000)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(fibonacci_loop_capped(0, 1000))
    print(fibonacci_loop_capped(5, 1000))
    print(fibonacci_loop_capped(10, 1000))
    print(fibonacci_loop_capped(20, 1000))

name: power_of_two_rec

name: gcd_subtraction_rec
cpp_unit: long gcd_subtraction_rec(long a, long b){ if(a==b) return a; if(a>b) return gcd_subtraction_rec(a-b,b); return gcd_subtraction_rec(a,b-a); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", gcd_subtraction_rec(48,18)); printf("%ld

    print(gcd_subtraction_rec(100, 10))
    print(gcd_subtraction_rec(7, 7))

name: reverse_number_rec
